Home.professional-profile: I create elegant, warm, and functional digital experiences, blending thoughtful design with modern technologies.

Services.description01: I offer comprehensive web development services, from front-end to back-end, using modern technologies to create scalable and efficient applications.
Services.description02: I am constantly learning and applying machine learning and artificial intelligence techniques to develop predictive models and automated solutions.
Services.description03: Expert in data manipulation and visualization using Power BI to transform complex data into interactive and easy-to-understand reports.
Services.description04: With extensive knowledge in Python, I develop customized solutions, from process automation to API creation and data analysis.

Resume.experience-description: Throughout my career, I have worked on various projects ranging from web application development to implementing artificial intelligence solutions. My focus has always been on creating high-quality software that meets client needs and enhances user experience.
Resume.education-description: I have a solid educational background in software engineering, which has provided me with the theoretical and practical knowledge necessary to excel in my field. I am committed to continuous learning and staying updated with the latest technologies.
Resume.educationDegree01: Technologist in Analysis and Development of Information Systems
Resume.skills-description: I possess a diverse set of skills that enable me to tackle complex challenges and deliver innovative solutions. My expertise includes web development, machine learning, data analysis, and more.
Resume.about-me-description: I am a passionate software developer focused on efficient, scalable, and visually polished solutions. I enjoy technical challenges, continuous learning, and collaborating to create thoughtful digital experiences.

Contact.title: Contact me
Contact.description: If you have any questions or want to discuss a project, feel free to reach out. I'm here to help shape a memorable digital experience.
